appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a light, dark, or system-matched theme for the app and assistant panel.
appearance.textSizeDescription: Scale the size of text and controls across the app.

sectionSubtitles.general: Shortcuts, your microphone, and how the app looks.
sectionSubtitles.dictation: The model that turns your voice into text, and how it's cleaned up.
sectionSubtitles.assistant: Set up the assistant, then tune its voice, screen vision, and web search.
sectionSubtitles.history: Your recent transcriptions and assistant chats, stored on this device.
sectionSubtitles.about: Version, app language, data locations, and credits.

speechToText.title: 選擇語音轉文字模型
speechToText.subtitle: 此功能完全在您的裝置上執行，將語音轉換為文字。請選擇適合您電腦的模型——隨時可以更改。

fast.description: Blazingly fast, streams as you speak. English only.

speechToText.installedHint: Already set up. You can grab any other model later in Settings.
speechToText.downloadingHint: It downloads in the background. Any other model is one click away in Settings.
speechToText.downloadStarted: Downloading your model in the background.

aiModel.title: 新增本機 AI 模型
aiModel.subtitle: 為助理、螢幕視覺與轉錄整理提供支援——完全在您的裝置上離線執行。此為選用項目；您也可以稍後連接雲端服務供應商。

small.description: Runs on any machine. Great for tidying up your writing.

mid.description: A quick all-rounder that can also answer questions.

capable.description: The sharpest answers, and it can see your screen.

aiModel.skipHint: 選用。您可以隨時在「設定」中下載模型或連接雲端服務供應商。
aiModel.downloadingHint: 您的模型正在背景下載——您可以立即開始使用應用程式。
aiModel.downloadStarted: 正在背景下載您的 AI 模型。

ready.title: You're ready.
ready.subtitle: Two shortcuts are all you need. Press, talk, done.
ready.dictateCaption: Hold, talk, let go. Your words type themselves.
ready.assistantKeysCaption: Hold and ask. It can even see your screen.
ready.changeAnytime: You can change these anytime in Settings.
ready.downloadingAssistant: Your assistant is moving in. {{percentage}}% there.
ready.downloadingVoice: Your voice model is landing. {{percentage}}% there.

errors.selectModel: Couldn't select that model. Please try again.

parakeet-unified-en-0.6b-gguf.description: Blazingly fast, great for everyday dictation. English only.

canary-180m-flash-gguf.description: Tiny and instant — runs well on any machine.

cohere-transcribe-03-2026-gguf.description: Slower, but the most accurate. 14 languages.

whisper-medium-gguf.description: Best for many languages — nearly 100 supported.

gemma-3-1b.description: Very small and quick, but limited for open-ended conversation. Text only.

qwen3.5-2b.description: Small and fast, and it can see images. Good on most laptops.

qwen3.5-4b.description: A legacy vision model whose optional reasoning can delay conversational replies.

qwen3.5-9b.description: More capable, but slower for live conversation, especially when reasoning is enabled.

qwen3.5-27b.description: A large vision model for deliberate tasks, not a low-latency assistant.

gemma-4-e2b.description: The quickest current Gemma for everyday conversation. Less capable on complex requests.

gemma-4-e4b.description: Recommended for conversation: a stronger quality-and-speed balance without default thinking.

gemma-4-12b.description: More capable for nuanced questions, but noticeably slower and best with a strong GPU.

gemma-3-4b.description: Fast, clean answers with screen vision, but less capable than current Gemma 4 models.

kokoro-82m.description: Built-in local voice for the assistant. No download needed.

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: 僅支援英語，英語使用者的最佳模型

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: 速度極快，僅支援英語，擅長處理各種口音

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: 快速，僅支援英語。速度與準確度的良好平衡。

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: 針對臺灣華語最佳化。支援語碼轉換。

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: 速度極快。支援中文、英語、日語、韓語、粵語。

gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.name: GigaAM v3
gigaam-v3-e2e-ctc.description: 俄語語音辨識。快速且準確。

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: 速度極快。支援英語、德語、西班牙語、法語。支援翻譯。

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: 準確的多語言模型。25種歐洲語言。支援翻譯。

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: 大型模型，速度較慢，但多語言辨識非常準確。

permissions.title: 需要權限
permissions.description: SpeakoFlow 需要一些權限才能正常運作

microphone.title: 麥克風存取
microphone.description: 需要聽取您的語音進行轉錄

accessibility.title: 輔助使用存取
accessibility.description: 需要將轉錄文字輸入到您的應用程式中

enable.label: Remember me
enable.description: Let the assistant keep and use a personal memory. Off by default.

incognito.label: Incognito chat
incognito.description: For this conversation, don't use memory and don't learn anything new.

detail.label: Memory detail
detail.description: How much memory to add to each reply. More detail is richer but a little slower.

aboutYou.label: About you
aboutYou.caption: A short, always-on summary the assistant keeps in mind.
aboutYou.placeholder: e.g. Prefers short, direct answers. Works in Rust and TypeScript. Building a desktop voice assistant.
aboutYou.hint: Always included when memory is on. Keep it to a few sentences — this is the assistant's at-a-glance picture of you.
aboutYou.empty: Nothing saved yet — the assistant fills this in as it learns, or click Edit to write your own.

notes.label: Notes
notes.caption: Specific things worth remembering — learned or added by you.
notes.empty: No notes yet. Add one below, or let the assistant learn them from your chats.

distill.label: Learn from this chat now
distill.description: Pull durable facts from your current conversation into memory, right now.

modelSettings.title: {{model}} 設定
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: 此模型自動運行，無需設定

shortcut.title: SpeakoFlow 快捷鍵
shortcut.description: 設定啟動語音轉文字錄製的鍵盤快捷鍵

transcribe.name: 轉錄快捷鍵
transcribe.description: 用於錄製和轉錄語音的鍵盤快捷鍵

transcribe_toggle.name: Hands-free dictation
transcribe_toggle.description: Press once to start, again to stop — no holding needed.

cancel.name: 取消快捷鍵
cancel.description: 用於取消目前錄製的鍵盤快捷鍵

transcribe_with_post_process.name: 後處理快捷鍵
transcribe_with_post_process.description: 可選：專用快捷鍵，使用時一律對轉錄結果套用 AI 後處理

assistant.name: Ask assistant
assistant.description: Ask the assistant by voice; the answer streams into the floating panel.

assistant_vision.name: Ask with screen
assistant_vision.description: Ask by voice with your screen attached so it can see what you're looking at.

assistant_panel_toggle.name: Show or hide panel
assistant_panel_toggle.description: Shows or hides the floating assistant panel.

errors.reset: 無法將快捷鍵重設為原始值

language.title: 語言
language.description: 選擇語音識別的語言。選擇自動將自動判定語言，選擇特定語言可以提高該語言的準確度
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet 模型會自動偵測語言，無需手動選擇

tapToLock.label: Tap to lock
tapToLock.info: While holding your record shortcut, tap this to lock hands-free recording so you can let go and keep talking. Pick any key that isn't part of your record shortcut, or clear it to turn this off.

models.title: 轉錄模型
models.description: 選擇轉錄模型或下載其他模型。不同模型提供不同的準確度和速度
models.deleteConfirm: 確定要刪除 {{modelName}} 嗎？刪除後須重新下載才能使用
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} 是您目前使用的模型。刪除後將停止轉錄，直到您選擇新的模型。確定要刪除嗎？

categoryDescriptions.stt: Models trade accuracy for speed — pick one that fits your machine.
categoryDescriptions.llm: Local models for the built-in assistant and AI cleanup.
categoryDescriptions.tts: Voices for the assistant's spoken replies. Kokoro runs on your machine.

models.llmHint: After downloading, pick this model in the Assistant section under the built-in (local) provider.
models.ttsHint: Speech models run on your machine and need no download.
models.noModelsMatch: 沒有符合此篩選條件的模型
models.olderModelsHint: Run on the previous engine. Still fully supported — most people won't need these.

customModel.searchDescription: Search Hugging Face for a GGUF model. This is an advanced option, so hardware needs and compatibility can vary.
customModel.title: Search Hugging Face
customModel.subtitle: Find a GGUF model to download and run on this machine.
customModel.searchError: Search failed. Check your connection and try again.
customModel.noResults: No models found. Try a different search.
customModel.repoFilesError: Couldn't load files for this model.
customModel.noGgufFiles: This repository has no downloadable .gguf files.
customModel.selectQuantHint: Not sure? Q4_K_M is usually the best balance of quality, speed, and memory use.
customModel.enableVisionHint: Downloads an extra file so the model can understand images.
customModel.addError: Couldn't add this model. Please try again.

microphone.title: 麥克風
microphone.description: 選擇您偏好的麥克風裝置

audioFeedback.label: 聲音回饋
audioFeedback.description: 錄製開始和停止時播放聲音

soundTheme.label: Feedback sound
soundTheme.description: Choose the start/stop cue played during dictation

outputDevice.title: 輸出裝置
outputDevice.description: 選擇用於聲音回饋的音訊輸出裝置

aiCorrection.label: AI cleanup (in development)
aiCorrection.description: Experimental: clean up your dictation with AI. Rough and unpolished — off by default.
aiCorrection.info: Runs a language model over your dictation to fix punctuation, remove filler words, and optionally adjust the tone. Applies to dictation only (not the assistant chat) and runs on its own shortcut. It adds a delay since the model runs after transcription; if it fails or times out, your raw text is pasted instead. Uses your assistant's model by default. This feature is still in development — you can't yet pick a built-in local model from its own list, and it needs more tuning before it's a main feature.

postProcessTimeout.title: AI cleanup timeout
postProcessTimeout.description: How long to wait for the model before giving up and pasting your raw transcription instead. On the built-in local model, allow enough time for it to load on first use.

experimentalToggle.label: 實驗性功能
experimentalToggle.description: 啟用仍在開發中的實驗性功能

lazyStreamClose.label: 在轉錄之間保持麥克風開啟
lazyStreamClose.description: 錄音停止後保持麥克風串流開啟30秒，減少連續轉錄時的延遲。啟用時可能會降低藍牙音訊品質。

liveTranscription.label: Live transcription
liveTranscription.description: Transcribe speech as you talk, instead of all at once when you stop. Experimental.

liveTranscriptionWindow.label: Live transcription window
liveTranscriptionWindow.description: While live transcription runs, show a larger overlay card with the running text instead of the compact pill. Requires live transcription.

whisper.title: Whisper 加速
whisper.description: Whisper 模型的硬體加速。自動模式在可用時使用 GPU（macOS 上使用 Metal，Windows/Linux 上使用 Vulkan）。

ort.title: ONNX 加速
ort.description: ONNX 模型的硬體加速（Parakeet、Canary、Moonshine 等）。Windows 上的 DirectML 為實驗性功能。模型可能無法正常轉錄。

gpuDevice.title: GPU 裝置
gpuDevice.description: 選擇用於 Whisper 推理的 GPU。自動選擇獨立 GPU。

startHidden.label: 隱藏啟動
startHidden.description: 啟動至系統匣而不開啟視窗

autostart.label: 開機啟動
autostart.description: 登入電腦時自動啟動 SpeakoFlow

showTrayIcon.label: 顯示系統匣圖示
showTrayIcon.description: 在系統匣中顯示 SpeakoFlow 圖示

overlayStyle.title: Overlay
overlayStyle.description: How the recording overlay looks while you dictate. None hides it, Minimal is the compact pill, and Live shows a readable card with your words as you speak (for models that support it).

overlay.title: 懸浮窗位置
overlay.description: 在錄製和轉錄期間顯示視覺回饋懸浮窗。在 Linux 上建議選擇「無」

pasteMethod.title: 貼上方式
pasteMethod.description: 選擇文字插入方式。直接：透過系統輸入模擬打字。無：跳過貼上，僅更新歷史紀錄/剪貼簿

typingTool.title: 輸入工具
typingTool.description: 選擇在直接貼上方式下使用的 Linux 輸入工具。選擇自動會自動偵測並使用系統中可用的最佳工具

clipboardHandling.title: 剪貼簿處理
clipboardHandling.description: 不修改剪貼簿將在轉錄後保留目前剪貼簿內容。複製到剪貼簿會在貼上後將轉錄結果留在剪貼簿中

autoSubmit.title: 自動送出
autoSubmit.description: 插入文字後自動發送指定的按鍵組合。macOS 為 Cmd+Enter，Windows/Linux 為 Super+Enter

translateToEnglish.label: 翻譯為英語
translateToEnglish.description: 在轉錄過程中自動將其他語言的語音翻譯為英語

modelUnload.title: 卸載模型
modelUnload.description: 當模型在指定時間內未使用時自動釋放 GPU/CPU 記憶體

customWords.title: 自訂詞彙
customWords.description: 新增經常被誤聽或拼寫錯誤的詞彙。系統會自動將發音相似的詞彙修正為您列表中的詞彙
customWords.info: Example: add “Kokoro” if SpeakoFlow writes “Coco row.”

textReplacements.title: Text replacements
textReplacements.description: Replace a phrase in your transcript with text you use often. Example: “my email” becomes “alex@example.com”.
textReplacements.rulesHint: Choose what SpeakoFlow hears and what it should insert.
textReplacements.empty: Create a rule for a phrase you say often.
textReplacements.importError: Could not import: the file is not a valid replacements list
textReplacements.magicHint: Use [date], [time], [uppercase], [lowercase], [capitalize], or [nospace] in the inserted text.

tone.title: Tone
tone.description: Optionally rewrite your cleaned-up dictation in a chosen tone. "None" just tidies the text without changing the wording.
tone.instructionsPlaceholder: Describe exactly how the wording should change. Example: Remove profanity and replace it with calm, neutral wording.
tone.instructionsHint: These rules shape the wording after cleanup. They stay separate from your cleanup prompt.

provider.title: 供應商
provider.description: 選擇一個相容 OpenAI 的供應商

appleIntelligence.title: Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.description: 完全在裝置上運行，無需 API 金鑰或網路存取
appleIntelligence.requirements: 需要執行 macOS Tahoe（26.0）或更高版本的 Apple Silicon Mac。必須在系統設定中啟用 Apple Intelligence
appleIntelligence.unavailable: Apple Intelligence 在此裝置上不可用。需要執行 macOS Tahoe（26.0）或更高版本的 Apple Silicon Mac，並在系統設定中啟用 Apple Intelligence

baseUrl.title: 基礎網址
baseUrl.description: 所選供應商的 API 基礎網址，僅自訂供應商可編輯

apiKey.title: API 金鑰
apiKey.description: 所選供應商的 API 金鑰

builtin.modelDescription: Pick a model you've downloaded. It runs on your machine with no API key or setup.
builtin.noModels: No local models yet. Download one from the model catalog.
builtin.ready: Runs fully on your machine. No API key, no setup.

model.title: 模型
model.descriptionApple: 可設定 token 數量上限，或保持裝置預設值
model.descriptionCustom: 輸入自訂端點所需的模型 ID
model.descriptionDefault: 從所選供應商的可用模型中選擇

location.title: Where it runs
location.description: Run cleanup privately with a downloaded model or use a cloud provider.

prompts.title: 提示詞

selectedPrompt.title: 已選提示詞
selectedPrompt.description: 選擇用於最佳化轉錄的範本或建立新範本。在提示詞文字中使用 ${output} 來引用轉錄結果

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: 撰寫轉錄後要執行的指令。範例：改善以下文字的語法和清晰度: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: 提示：使用 ${output} 將轉錄文字插入到您的提示詞中
prompts.selectToEdit: 選擇上方的提示詞以檢視和編輯其詳細資訊
prompts.createFirst: 點選上方的「建立新提示詞」來建立您的第一個後處理提示詞

readiness.selectModel: Select a model for this provider.
readiness.addApiKey: Add an API key for this provider.
readiness.providerMissing: The selected provider is no longer available.

errors.saveFailed: Couldn’t save the AI cleanup setting.
errors.modelsLoadFailed: Couldn’t load models for this provider.
errors.promptSelectFailed: Created the prompt, but couldn’t select it.
errors.toneSelectAfterCreateFailed: Created the style, but couldn’t select it.

hero.noModelCaption: Pick a model so your voice becomes text.

catalog.title: Choose your model
catalog.description: Every model runs on your machine — trade accuracy for speed and pick the one that fits.

aiCleanup.title: Fix up my dictation with AI
aiCleanup.caption: Experimental — tidies punctuation and filler after you dictate.
aiCleanup.info: Runs a language model over your dictation to fix punctuation, remove filler words, and optionally adjust the tone. Applies to dictation only, on its own shortcut. It adds a short delay after you speak; if the model fails or times out, your raw text is used instead. Still in development.
aiCleanup.styleGroupDescription: Choose a built-in style or save your own rules for how cleaned dictation should sound.

spokenEmoji.title: 語音表情符號
spokenEmoji.description: 說出「happy emoji」或「thumbs up emoji」即可插入 😊 或 👍。常見別名和輕微的語音轉文字錯誤會在裝置上處理；無法辨識的名稱會保留為文字。

history.title: 歷史紀錄

storage.title: Recording storage
storage.description: These controls affect recordings only. Starred recordings are always kept. Assistant chats have separate storage.

history.empty: 還沒有轉錄紀錄。開始錄製以建立您的歷史紀錄！
history.transcriptionFailed: 轉錄失敗。您可以使用重試圖示重新轉錄。
history.resumeConversation: Continue this conversation in the assistant
history.deleteAssistantError: Couldn't delete the conversation. Please try again.

updateChecks.label: 檢查更新
updateChecks.description: 自動檢查 SpeakoFlow 的新版本

soundTheme.label: 聲音主題
soundTheme.description: 選擇錄製開始和停止回饋的聲音主題

wordCorrectionThreshold.title: 詞彙修正閾值
wordCorrectionThreshold.description: 自訂詞彙修正的靈敏度

historyLimit.title: 歷史紀錄上限
historyLimit.description: 歷史紀錄的最大保留筆數

recordingRetention.title: 自動刪除錄音
recordingRetention.description: 自動刪除舊錄音以節省空間

alwaysOnMicrophone.label: 麥克風常開
alwaysOnMicrophone.description: 保持麥克風啟用以獲得更快的回應

clamshellMicrophone.title: 闔蓋麥克風
clamshellMicrophone.description: 筆記型電腦闔蓋時使用的麥克風

postProcessingToggle.label: 後處理
postProcessingToggle.description: 啟用轉錄後的 AI 文字最佳化

muteWhileRecording.label: 錄製時靜音
muteWhileRecording.description: 錄製期間靜音系統音訊

appendTrailingSpace.label: 附加尾部空格
appendTrailingSpace.description: 在貼上的轉錄後新增空格

keyboardImplementation.title: 鍵盤實作
keyboardImplementation.description: 選擇鍵盤快捷鍵的後端
keyboardImplementation.bindingsReset: 鍵盤快捷鍵不相容，已重設為預設值

pasteDelay.title: 貼上延遲
pasteDelay.description: 發送貼上按鍵前的延遲（毫秒）。如果貼上了錯誤的文字，請增加此值

recordingBuffer.title: 額外錄音緩衝
recordingBuffer.description: 放開按鍵後繼續錄音的額外時間（毫秒），以捕捉尾音。0 = 無額外緩衝。

updates.title: Updates
updates.disabledHint: Automatic update checks are off. Turn them on in General.

sourceCode.title: 原始碼
sourceCode.description: 檢視原始碼並參與貢獻

license.title: License
license.description: SpeakoFlow is open source under the MIT License, building on Handy (also MIT) by CJ Pais.

supportDevelopment.title: 支持開發
supportDevelopment.description: 幫助我們繼續開發 SpeakoFlow

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: The open-source app SpeakoFlow is built on
handy.details: SpeakoFlow began as a fork of Handy by CJ Pais. Huge thanks to the original project and its contributors for the foundation.

whisper.title: Whisper.cpp
whisper.description: 針對 OpenAI Whisper 自動語音識別模型的高效能推理引擎
whisper.details: SpeakoFlow 使用 Whisper.cpp 進行快速的本機語音轉文字處理。感謝 Georgi Gerganov 和貢獻者們的傑出工作

llamacpp.title: llama.cpp
llamacpp.description: The engine powering the built-in local language model
llamacpp.details: SpeakoFlow runs local LLMs with llama.cpp. Thanks to Georgi Gerganov and the ggml community for making fast, on-device inference possible.

kokoro.title: Kokoro
kokoro.description: The local text-to-speech voice for the assistant
kokoro.details: SpeakoFlow speaks replies using the Kokoro TTS model, running entirely on your device. Thanks to the Kokoro project and its contributors.

brain.title: Assistant brain
brain.description: Choose whether your assistant runs privately on this device or through a cloud provider.
brain.downloadModelDescription: Pick a recommended model or search Hugging Face.
brain.catalogDescription: Choose a model to download. It stays on this machine and needs no API key.
brain.currentModelDescription: Selected for the built-in assistant on this device.
brain.recommendedDescription: Three conversation-first choices: quickest, recommended, and more capable but slower.
brain.acceleratorUnknownWithMemory: Graphics memory unavailable · {{memory}} GB system RAM for CPU fallback
brain.acceleratorUnknown: Graphics memory unavailable · response speed cannot be predicted
brain.switchBeforeDelete: Switch the built-in assistant to another model before deleting this one.
brain.deleteModelConfirm: Delete {{modelName}}? Its downloaded files and saved entry will be removed.
brain.visionModelNote: Screen vision downloads an additional image file automatically.
brain.finderSectionDescription: Search Hugging Face when you need a different model size or capability.
brain.finderDescription: Search thousands of GGUF models and download one directly to SpeakoFlow.
brain.huggingFaceDescription: Models you added yourself. Compatibility and performance can vary.
brain.catalogEmpty: No recommended local models are available right now.

subpages.profilesCaption: Switch the assistant's name, role, and personality.
subpages.memoryCaption: What the assistant remembers about you between chats.

tapToLock.label: Tap to lock
tapToLock.info: While holding the assistant shortcut, tap this to lock hands-free so you can let go and keep talking. Pick a key that isn't part of your assistant shortcut (one that overlaps is ignored), or clear it to turn this off.

provider.title: Assistant provider
provider.providerDescription: The provider that answers assistant questions.
provider.baseUrlDescription: OpenAI-compatible base URL. Azure URLs are normalized automatically.
provider.modelDescription: Model or deployment name to use for assistant answers.
provider.noModelsFound: No models returned. Type the model name instead.
provider.builtinModelDescription: Pick a downloaded local model. It runs on your machine with no API key.
provider.builtinNoModels: No models on your machine yet — download one below.
provider.builtinReady: Runs fully on your machine. No API key, no setup.
provider.builtinEngineMissing: First use downloads a small local engine automatically (one time), then runs fully offline. No setup needed.
provider.contextSizeDescription: How much the local model can keep in mind at once — the system instructions, your chat history, any screenshot (a single image can eat a big chunk), and its reply. Bigger holds more and keeps screen vision and web search reliable, but uses more memory. The default is 8192; 16384 is a good step up if your machine has the RAM to spare. You can lower it later to save memory.
provider.unloadTimeoutDescription: Free up memory by unloading the local model after it has been idle this long. It reloads automatically on next use.

characters.title: Profiles
characters.description: Task-focused profiles you can switch between. The active profile sets the assistant's name, role, and instructions — and how long its replies run. Switch anytime from the panel header.
characters.aiPlaceholder: e.g. a concise release-notes writer, or a patient tutor who explains every step
characters.rolePlaceholder: Short description shown on the card (optional)

responseLength.label: Response length
responseLength.hint: How long this profile's replies run. "Inherit" follows your global Assistant setting.

characters.greetingPlaceholder: Optional opening line shown in an empty chat
characters.catNote: The Cat ignores the AI entirely — it just meows. Nothing to configure here.
characters.deleteConfirm: Delete this profile? This can't be undone.
characters.emptyState: No profiles yet. Create your first one to give the assistant a personality.

memory.label: Conversation memory
memory.description: How many recent messages are sent as context each turn. 0 disables memory.

responseLength.label: Response length
responseLength.description: Preferred reply length. "No effect" leaves your prompt untouched.

descriptions.off: Screen capture is disabled. Camera and region controls are hidden.
descriptions.manual: You choose when to attach the full screen or a region. Voice capture timing applies.
descriptions.agent_decides: The model may request a screen capture when it needs current visual context. Every screenshot sent is shown in the conversation.

timing.label: When to capture
timing.description: For voice questions: capture the moment you start asking, or wait until the message is sent. Typed messages always capture on send.

webSearch.title: Web search
webSearch.enableDescription: Let the assistant search the web when a question needs current information.
webSearch.openRouterNativeDescription: When on, OpenRouter runs the search itself (its :online mode) using your OpenRouter credits. When off, the app searches with your search provider below.
webSearch.providerDescription: Serper is a good default. Every provider has a free tier.
webSearch.apiKeyDescription: Key for the selected search provider.
webSearch.fetchContentDescription: Read the full text of each result instead of snippets. Better answers, but slower.
webSearch.depthDescription: Quick for simple facts, Standard for most questions, Deep for hard ones.
webSearch.localSmartDescription: Let the local model decide when to search. Off uses a fast keyword check instead.
webSearch.creditBudgetDescription: Daily cap on Firecrawl credits before search pauses. 0 = no limit.
webSearch.testDescription: Run a sample search with the current provider and key.

tts.title: Voice output
tts.enableDescription: Read the assistant's replies out loud.
tts.stopOnDictationDescription: Stop any reply that's still playing when you start dictating.
tts.engineDescription: Kokoro runs locally for free. The other engines use your API key.
tts.kokoroSetupDescription: Download it once, then spoken replies run privately on this device.
tts.dtypeDescription: fp32 is highest quality; q8 is faster on CPU. Changing this reloads the model.
tts.testDescription: Play a short sample with the current settings.
tts.testPhrase: Hi! This is a test of SpeakoFlow's voice output.
tts.downloadError: Couldn't download the Kokoro voice model
tts.baseUrlDescription: OpenAI-compatible TTS URL. A base URL or a full /audio/speech URL both work.
tts.azureBaseUrlDescription: Your Azure Speech URL from the portal, e.g. https://eastus2.tts.speech.microsoft.com.
tts.modelDescription: Model or deployment name, e.g. gpt-4o-mini-tts (OpenAI/Azure) or eleven_flash_v2_5 (ElevenLabs).
tts.remoteVoiceDescription: Voice for OpenAI-compatible TTS, e.g. alloy, echo, nova, shimmer.
tts.azureVoiceDescription: Azure voice name, e.g. en-US-JennyNeural. Click Load voices to browse.
tts.elevenVoiceDescription: ElevenLabs voice ID (from the Voices tab in their dashboard).
tts.promptDescription: Instructions for generating the brief spoken summary of each answer.

appearance.title: Panel appearance
appearance.previewDescription: Live preview of the panel with your text size and opacity.
appearance.previewAssistant: Lots! Ask me anything — I can even look at your screen.
appearance.fontSizeDescription: Size of the chat text in the assistant panel.
appearance.panelSizeDescription: Overall size of the floating assistant panel. You can also drag its edges to resize.
appearance.opacityDescription: How opaque the floating panel is. 100% is fully solid; lower values let the desktop blur through.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

accessibility.permissionsDescription: SpeakoFlow 需要輔助使用權限才能輸入轉錄的文字

micPermissionDenied.generic: 作業系統拒絕了麥克風存取。請在系統設定中授予麥克風權限。
micPermissionDenied.windows: 在設定 → 隱私與安全性 → 麥克風（包括桌面應用程式存取）中啟用麥克風存取。
micPermissionDenied.macos: 在系統設定 → 隱私與安全性 → 麥克風中授予麥克風存取權限。
micPermissionDenied.linux: 在系統的聲音或隱私設定中授予麥克風存取權限。

errors.noInputDevice: 未偵測到音訊輸入裝置。請連接麥克風或耳機後重試。
errors.pasteFailed: 無法將文字貼上至目前作用中的應用程式。

appLanguage.title: 應用程式語言
appLanguage.description: 變更 SpeakoFlow 介面的語言

overlay.locked: Recording hands-free — press the hotkey again to stop
overlay.askAssistant: Ask the assistant instead of typing this

assistant.title: Assistant
assistant.empty:
Ask by voice with your assistant shortcut,
or type below.
assistant.regenerate: Regenerate answer (the old one stays in History)
assistant.attachScreen: Screen vision — attach your screen to each message until turned off

attach.snip: Snip a region of the screen

snip.hint: Drag to snip a region — Esc to cancel

pill.disarmScreen: Screen vision is on — click to turn it off
pill.armScreen: Screen vision is off — click to turn it on

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.no_provider: No assistant model is set up yet. Pick a provider in Settings → Assistant.
errors.no_model: Your provider has no model selected. Choose one in Settings → Assistant.
errors.engine_start: The built-in model couldn't start. Try again, or pick a different model in Settings → Assistant.
errors.provider: The model couldn't answer. Check your API key and connection, then try again.
errors.vision_unsupported: This model can't read your screen. Pick a vision-capable model in Settings → Assistant, or ask again without screen vision.
errors.screenshot_too_large: The screen capture was too large for this provider. Please try again — it will be compressed harder.
errors.screen_capture: Couldn't capture the screen. Try again, or ask without screen vision.
errors.transcription: Couldn't transcribe your voice. Please try speaking again.
errors.tts: The spoken reply failed. Check your TTS settings, or read the answer in the panel.
errors.tts_local: The local voice couldn't load. Check your connection or switch TTS engines in Settings.
errors.tts_blocked: Your system blocked the voice from playing on its own. Click anywhere in the panel to hear the reply.
errors.tts_blockedShort: Tap the panel to hear it
errors.tts_playback: Couldn't play the voice on your output device. Check your speaker/output settings, then try again.
errors.mic_denied: Microphone access is blocked. Allow it in your system privacy settings.
errors.mic_unavailable: No microphone was found. Connect one and try again.
errors.mic_error: The microphone couldn't start. It may be in use by another app.

notices.web_search_failed: Web search didn't return results — answering without them.
